name: 文献综合
subject: english
domain_name: 信息性文本 / Reading Informational / Reading Informational
curriculum_points: WHST.11-12.7 Conduct short as well as more sustained research projects to answer a question (including a self-generated question) or solve a problem; narrow or broaden the inquiry when appropriate; synthesize multiple sources on the subject, demonstrating understanding of the subject under investigation.
